form.formComment: Latest effort finished 5th over 375m at this track beaten 8 lengths (22.45) behind Zipping Mufasa in a Grade 3/4 on April 12. Should be right in the finish.

form.formComment: Was out of placings last time (22.29) at this track in a Grade 4/5, finishing fourth and beaten 6 lengths. Still a maiden from the draw but has placed three times. Makes appeal on best.
